# Master glossary

Every term from all 12 guides' Key-vocabulary tables, merged and alphabetized. Sources link to the originating guide's vocabulary section.

| Term | 中文 | Meaning | Source(s) |
|---|---|---|---|
| 3D flash | 三維閃存 | — | [Ch 3 — NAND Flash](../core/ch3-nand-flash.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |

| addressing | 尋址 | — | [Ch 3 — NAND Flash](../core/ch3-nand-flash.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |

| ALPM | — | Aggressive Link Power Management (SATA) | [Supp D — Power Management](../supplements/d-power-management.md#key-vocabulary) |

| cleaning | — | F2FS garbage collection (greedy / cost-benefit victim; ≈ SSD GC, Ch4) | [Supp C — Flash File Systems](../supplements/c-flash-file-systems.md#key-vocabulary) |
| CLKREQ# | — | PCIe sideband pin gating deep link states (≈ SATA DEVSLP) | [Supp D — Power Management](../supplements/d-power-management.md#key-vocabulary) |
| code rate R = k/n | — | data bits ÷ total bits | [Supp A — ECC Coding Theory](../supplements/a-ecc-coding-theory.md#key-vocabulary) |

| LEO / MEO / GEO | — | low / medium / geosynchronous orbit (rising radiation) | [Supp E — Aerospace Storage](../supplements/e-aerospace-storage.md#key-vocabulary) |
| LET | — | Linear Energy Transfer — particle energy deposition; sets upset threshold | [Supp E — Aerospace Storage](../supplements/e-aerospace-storage.md#key-vocabulary) |

| LLR | — | log-likelihood ratio; sign = guess, magnitude = confidence | [Supp A — ECC Coding Theory](../supplements/a-ecc-coding-theory.md#key-vocabulary) |
| log-on-log | — | inefficiency of a log-structured FS atop a log-structured FTL | [Supp C — Flash File Systems](../supplements/c-flash-file-systems.md#key-vocabulary) |
| logic analyzer | 邏輯分析儀 | — | [Ch 7 — SSD Testing](../core/ch7-testing.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| logical / physical address | 邏輯地址 / 物理地址 | — | [Ch 4 — FTL](../core/ch4-ftl.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| Logical Block Address | 邏輯塊地址 (LBA) | — | [Ch 6 — NVMe](../core/ch6-nvme.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| logical page / physical page | 邏輯頁 / 物理頁 | — | [Ch 4 — FTL](../core/ch4-ftl.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| Logical Unit (LU) | — | addressable storage space (≈ NVMe Namespace / SCSI LUN) | [Supp B — UFS](../supplements/b-ufs.md#key-vocabulary) |
| M-PHY | — | UFS physical layer (differential serial, "Gears") | [Supp B — UFS](../supplements/b-ufs.md#key-vocabulary) |
| MAC / HMAC | — | message authentication code (signs RPMB access) | [Supp B — UFS](../supplements/b-ufs.md#key-vocabulary) |
| (main) controller | 主控 | — | [Ch 1 — SSD Overview](../core/ch1-overview.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) · [Ch 2 — Controllers & AFA](../core/ch2-controllers-afa.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| managed NAND | — | controller + flash + firmware in one package | [Supp B — UFS](../supplements/b-ufs.md#key-vocabulary) |
| mapping / map table | 映射 / 映射表 | — | [Ch 4 — FTL](../core/ch4-ftl.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| mapping table | 映射表 | — | [Ch 1 — SSD Overview](../core/ch1-overview.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| MBU / MEU | — | Multiple-Bit Upset — one strike flips adjacent bits (challenges ECC) | [Supp E — Aerospace Storage](../supplements/e-aerospace-storage.md#key-vocabulary) |
| MCQ | — | Multi-Circular Queue (≈ NVMe multi-queue) | [Supp B — UFS](../supplements/b-ufs.md#key-vocabulary) |
| mechanical hard drive (HDD) | 機械硬盤 | — | [Ch 1 — SSD Overview](../core/ch1-overview.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| memory mapping | 內存映射 | — | [Ch 5 — PCIe](../core/ch5-pcie.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| metadata | 元數據 | — | [Ch 2 — Controllers & AFA](../core/ch2-controllers-afa.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) · [Ch 4 — FTL](../core/ch4-ftl.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) · [Ch 6 — NVMe](../core/ch6-nvme.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| min-sum | — | hardware-friendly approximation of sum-product | [Supp A — ECC Coding Theory](../supplements/a-ecc-coding-theory.md#key-vocabulary) |
| minimum distance dmin | — | smallest distance between any two codewords | [Supp A — ECC Coding Theory](../supplements/a-ecc-coding-theory.md#key-vocabulary) |
| MIPI | — | consortium behind mobile interface specs | [Supp B — UFS](../supplements/b-ufs.md#key-vocabulary) |
| mirroring | 鏡像 | — | [Ch 2 — Controllers & AFA](../core/ch2-controllers-afa.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| Modern Standby | — | instant-on always-connected standby (needs RTD3) | [Supp D — Power Management](../supplements/d-power-management.md#key-vocabulary) |
| MP / ENLAT / EXLAT | — | Max Power / entry latency / exit latency (state descriptor) | [Supp D — Power Management](../supplements/d-power-management.md#key-vocabulary) |
| multi-head logging | — | 6 logs separating hot/warm/cold data (≈ WL hot/cold, Ch4) | [Supp C — Flash File Systems](../supplements/c-flash-file-systems.md#key-vocabulary) |
| multipath | 多路徑 | — | [Ch 6 — NVMe](../core/ch6-nvme.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| Namespace | 命名空間 (NS) | — | [Ch 6 — NVMe](../core/ch6-nvme.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| NAT (Node Address Table) | — | node ID → physical address indirection (≈ FTL map, Ch4) | [Supp C — Flash File Systems](../supplements/c-flash-file-systems.md#key-vocabulary) |
| node | — | F2FS metadata unit: inode / direct node / indirect node | [Supp C — Flash File Systems](../supplements/c-flash-file-systems.md#key-vocabulary) |
| non-volatile | 非易失性 | — | [Ch 3 — NAND Flash](../core/ch3-nand-flash.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| normal / abnormal power loss | 正常/異常掉電 | — | [Ch 4 — FTL](../core/ch4-ftl.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| normalized / offset min-sum | — | corrected min-sum variants | [Supp A — ECC Coding Theory](../supplements/a-ecc-coding-theory.md#key-vocabulary) |
| NVMe power state (PS0–PS31) | — | up to 32 controller power states in Identify data | [Supp D — Power Management](../supplements/d-power-management.md#key-vocabulary) |
| operational / non-operational | — | NVMe states that can / cannot process I/O | [Supp D — Power Management](../supplements/d-power-management.md#key-vocabulary) |
| ordered / writeback / journal mode | — | EXT4 journaling modes | [Supp C — Flash File Systems](../supplements/c-flash-file-systems.md#key-vocabulary) |
| original flash manufacturer (fab) | 原廠 | — | [Ch 1 — SSD Overview](../core/ch1-overview.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| over-provisioning (OP) | 預留空間 | — | [Ch 4 — FTL](../core/ch4-ftl.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| overwrite-in-place | 覆蓋寫 | — | [Ch 1 — SSD Overview](../core/ch1-overview.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| packet | 數據包 | — | [Ch 5 — PCIe](../core/ch5-pcie.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| parity-check matrix H | — | checks: H·cᵀ = 0 | [Supp A — ECC Coding Theory](../supplements/a-ecc-coding-theory.md#key-vocabulary) |

| payload | 有效載荷 | — | [Ch 5 — PCIe](../core/ch5-pcie.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| performance loss | 性能損耗 | — | [Ch 5 — PCIe](../core/ch5-pcie.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |

| Phase Tag | 相位標籤 | — | [Ch 6 — NVMe](../core/ch6-nvme.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |

| point-to-point | 點到點 | — | [Ch 5 — PCIe](../core/ch5-pcie.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| power consumption | 功耗 | — | [Ch 1 — SSD Overview](../core/ch1-overview.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |

| power-loss recovery | 掉電恢復 | — | [Ch 4 — FTL](../core/ch4-ftl.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| power-vs-latency tradeoff | — | deeper state = less power but slower wake (the core principle) | [Supp D — Power Management](../supplements/d-power-management.md#key-vocabulary) |
| preconditioning | 預處理 | — | [Ch 7 — SSD Testing](../core/ch7-testing.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |

| Protection Information | 保護信息 (PI) | — | [Ch 6 — NVMe](../core/ch6-nvme.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| protocol analyzer | 協議分析儀 | — | [Ch 7 — SSD Testing](../core/ch7-testing.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| purge | 擦除 (預處理) | — | [Ch 7 — SSD Testing](../core/ch7-testing.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| QC-LDPC | — | quasi-cyclic LDPC built from circulant blocks (HW-friendly) | [Supp A — ECC Coding Theory](../supplements/a-ecc-coding-theory.md#key-vocabulary) |
| quantum tunneling | 量子隧道效應 | — | [Ch 3 — NAND Flash](../core/ch3-nand-flash.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| queue depth | 隊列深度 | — | [Ch 6 — NVMe](../core/ch6-nvme.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) · [Ch 7 — SSD Testing](../core/ch7-testing.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| rad / krad / Gray | — | units of absorbed radiation dose | [Supp E — Aerospace Storage](../supplements/e-aerospace-storage.md#key-vocabulary) |
| rad-hard vs rad-tolerant | — | hardened silicon vs COTS + system mitigation | [Supp E — Aerospace Storage](../supplements/e-aerospace-storage.md#key-vocabulary) |
| random / sequential | 隨機 / 順序(連續) | — | [Ch 1 — SSD Overview](../core/ch1-overview.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |

| RDMA | 遠程直接內存訪問 | — | [Ch 6 — NVMe](../core/ch6-nvme.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| read disturb | 讀干擾 | — | [Ch 3 — NAND Flash](../core/ch3-nand-flash.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| read retry | 重讀 | Ch3 mechanism; the basis of soft reads | [Ch 3 — NAND Flash](../core/ch3-nand-flash.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) · [Supp A — ECC Coding Theory](../supplements/a-ecc-coding-theory.md#key-vocabulary) |
| read scrub | 掃描重寫 / 數據巡檢 | — | [Ch 3 — NAND Flash](../core/ch3-nand-flash.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |

| redundancy / parity | — | extra bits added to enable correction | [Supp A — ECC Coding Theory](../supplements/a-ecc-coding-theory.md#key-vocabulary) |
| redundancy / parity check | 冗余校驗 | — | [Ch 2 — Controllers & AFA](../core/ch2-controllers-afa.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| reference count | 引用數 | — | [Ch 2 — Controllers & AFA](../core/ch2-controllers-afa.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |

| remap table | 重映射表 | — | [Ch 4 — FTL](../core/ch4-ftl.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| replay attack | — | re-sending a recorded message to undo a security state | [Supp B — UFS](../supplements/b-ufs.md#key-vocabulary) |
| retransmission (retry) | 重傳 | — | [Ch 5 — PCIe](../core/ch5-pcie.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| RHA | — | Radiation Hardness Assurance | [Supp E — Aerospace Storage](../supplements/e-aerospace-storage.md#key-vocabulary) |
| RHBD / RHBP | — | Rad-Hardening By Design / By Process | [Supp E — Aerospace Storage](../supplements/e-aerospace-storage.md#key-vocabulary) |
| ring / circular queue | 環形隊列 | — | [Ch 6 — NVMe](../core/ch6-nvme.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| robustness | 健壯性 | — | [Ch 7 — SSD Testing](../core/ch7-testing.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| Root Complex | 根複合體 (RC) | — | [Ch 5 — PCIe](../core/ch5-pcie.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| routing | 路由 | — | [Ch 5 — PCIe](../core/ch5-pcie.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| routing module | 路由模塊 | — | [Ch 2 — Controllers & AFA](../core/ch2-controllers-afa.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |

| RTD3 | — | Runtime D3 — remove main power at runtime for near-zero idle | [Supp D — Power Management](../supplements/d-power-management.md#key-vocabulary) |
| RTD3R | — | RTD3 resume latency (≤100 ms target for Modern Standby) | [Supp D — Power Management](../supplements/d-power-management.md#key-vocabulary) |
| S0–S5 | — | host ACPI system power states (working → off) | [Supp D — Power Management](../supplements/d-power-management.md#key-vocabulary) |
| sample size | 樣本大小 | — | [Ch 7 — SSD Testing](../core/ch7-testing.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| Scatter/Gather List | 分散聚集列表 (SGL) | — | [Ch 6 — NVMe](../core/ch6-nvme.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| scramble / de-scramble | 加擾 / 去擾 | — | [Ch 5 — PCIe](../core/ch5-pcie.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| SEE | — | Single Event Effect — single-particle-strike disruption | [Supp E — Aerospace Storage](../supplements/e-aerospace-storage.md#key-vocabulary) |
| SEFI | — | Single Event Functional Interrupt — device hangs, needs reset | [Supp E — Aerospace Storage](../supplements/e-aerospace-storage.md#key-vocabulary) |
| segment | 段 | — | [Ch 6 — NVMe](../core/ch6-nvme.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| segment / section / zone | — | F2FS allocation units (2 MB / group / group of sections) | [Supp C — Flash File Systems](../supplements/c-flash-file-systems.md#key-vocabulary) |
| SEGR / SEB | — | Single Event Gate Rupture / Burnout — destructive, high-voltage nodes | [Supp E — Aerospace Storage](../supplements/e-aerospace-storage.md#key-vocabulary) |
| SEL | — | Single Event Latchup — destructive high-current short | [Supp E — Aerospace Storage](../supplements/e-aerospace-storage.md#key-vocabulary) |
| sequence number | 序列號 | — | [Ch 5 — PCIe](../core/ch5-pcie.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |

| SET | — | Single Event Transient — voltage glitch | [Supp E — Aerospace Storage](../supplements/e-aerospace-storage.md#key-vocabulary) |
| SEU | — | Single Event Upset — soft bit flip (≈ Ch3 bit error) | [Supp E — Aerospace Storage](../supplements/e-aerospace-storage.md#key-vocabulary) |
| shadow copy | — | two-copy scheme; one always valid | [Supp C — Flash File Systems](../supplements/c-flash-file-systems.md#key-vocabulary) |
| sideband signal | 邊帶信號 | — | [Ch 5 — PCIe](../core/ch5-pcie.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |

| solid-state drive (SSD) | 固態硬盤 | — | [Ch 1 — SSD Overview](../core/ch1-overview.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |

| static power management | — | host pins the drive to a power budget | [Supp D — Power Management](../supplements/d-power-management.md#key-vocabulary) |
| steady state | 穩定態 | — | [Ch 7 — SSD Testing](../core/ch7-testing.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| storage controller | 存儲控制器 | — | [Ch 2 — Controllers & AFA](../core/ch2-controllers-afa.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |

| Submission Queue | 提交隊列 (SQ) | — | [Ch 6 — NVMe](../core/ch6-nvme.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| superblock (SB) | — | filesystem-wide metadata | [Supp C — Flash File Systems](../supplements/c-flash-file-systems.md#key-vocabulary) |
| switch | 交換機 (Switch) | — | [Ch 5 — PCIe](../core/ch5-pcie.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |

| syndrome s = H·rᵀ | — | depends only on the error; = 0 if no error | [Supp A — ECC Coding Theory](../supplements/a-ecc-coding-theory.md#key-vocabulary) |
| systematic form | — | G = [I \| P]; data appears uncoded in codeword | [Supp A — ECC Coding Theory](../supplements/a-ecc-coding-theory.md#key-vocabulary) |
| Tanner graph | — | bipartite graph of variable nodes ↔ check nodes | [Supp A — ECC Coding Theory](../supplements/a-ecc-coding-theory.md#key-vocabulary) |
| TBW (Total Bytes Written) | 總寫入量 | — | [Ch 7 — SSD Testing](../core/ch7-testing.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |

| throughput / bandwidth | 吞吐量 / 帶寬 | — | [Ch 1 — SSD Overview](../core/ch1-overview.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| TID | — | Total Ionizing Dose — cumulative radiation damage (≈ radiation-driven wear, Ch3) | [Supp E — Aerospace Storage](../supplements/e-aerospace-storage.md#key-vocabulary) |
| timestamp | 時間戳 | — | [Ch 4 — FTL](../core/ch4-ftl.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| TMR | — | Triple Modular Redundancy (triplicate + vote) | [Supp E — Aerospace Storage](../supplements/e-aerospace-storage.md#key-vocabulary) |
| topology | 拓撲結構 | — | [Ch 5 — PCIe](../core/ch5-pcie.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| Transaction Layer | 事務層 | — | [Ch 5 — PCIe](../core/ch5-pcie.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| tree structure | 樹形結構 | — | [Ch 5 — PCIe](../core/ch5-pcie.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| trigger | 觸發 | — | [Ch 7 — SSD Testing](../core/ch7-testing.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| tunnel oxide | 隧道氧化層 | — | [Ch 3 — NAND Flash](../core/ch3-nand-flash.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| two-level mapping (L2P) | 二級映射 | — | [Ch 4 — FTL](../core/ch4-ftl.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| UECC | — | uncorrectable ECC error → UBER event | [Supp A — ECC Coding Theory](../supplements/a-ecc-coding-theory.md#key-vocabulary) |
| UFS | — | Universal Flash Storage (JEDEC mobile storage standard) | [Supp B — UFS](../supplements/b-ufs.md#key-vocabulary) |
| UIC | — | UFS Interconnect (UniPro + M-PHY) | [Supp B — UFS](../supplements/b-ufs.md#key-vocabulary) |
| unified / normalized (design) | 歸一化 | — | [Ch 2 — Controllers & AFA](../core/ch2-controllers-afa.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| UniPro | — | UFS link/transport layer (flow control, retransmit) | [Supp B — UFS](../supplements/b-ufs.md#key-vocabulary) |
| UPIU | — | UFS Protocol Information Unit (the packet) | [Supp B — UFS](../supplements/b-ufs.md#key-vocabulary) |
| upscreening | — | testing/qualifying commercial parts for space use | [Supp E — Aerospace Storage](../supplements/e-aerospace-storage.md#key-vocabulary) |
| upstream / downstream port | 上游 / 下游端口 | — | [Ch 5 — PCIe](../core/ch5-pcie.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| user space / kernel space | 用戶態 / 內核態 | — | [Ch 2 — Controllers & AFA](../core/ch2-controllers-afa.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| UTP | — | UFS Transport Protocol (makes UPIUs) | [Supp B — UFS](../supplements/b-ufs.md#key-vocabulary) |
| valid data / invalid (garbage) data | 有效數據 / 無效(垃圾)數據 | — | [Ch 4 — FTL](../core/ch4-ftl.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| Van Allen belts | — | Earth's trapped-radiation regions | [Supp E — Aerospace Storage](../supplements/e-aerospace-storage.md#key-vocabulary) |
| variable node (VN) | — | one per codeword bit | [Supp A — ECC Coding Theory](../supplements/a-ecc-coding-theory.md#key-vocabulary) |
| verification / validation | 驗證 / 確認 | — | [Ch 7 — SSD Testing](../core/ch7-testing.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| VFS | — | Virtual File System (uniform kernel API above all filesystems) | [Supp C — Flash File Systems](../supplements/c-flash-file-systems.md#key-vocabulary) |
| wandering tree | — | LFS cascade of pointer updates; solved by NAT | [Supp C — Flash File Systems](../supplements/c-flash-file-systems.md#key-vocabulary) |
| wear leveling | 磨損平衡 | — | [Ch 1 — SSD Overview](../core/ch1-overview.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) · [Ch 3 — NAND Flash](../core/ch3-nand-flash.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) · [Ch 4 — FTL](../core/ch4-ftl.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| Well-Known LU | — | special LUs: Boot, RPMB, Device, Report | [Supp B — UFS](../supplements/b-ufs.md#key-vocabulary) |
| with computation capability | 帶計算功能 | — | [Ch 2 — Controllers & AFA](../core/ch2-controllers-afa.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| wordline / bitline | 字線 / 位線 | — | [Ch 3 — NAND Flash](../core/ch3-nand-flash.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| write amplification | 寫放大 | — | [Ch 3 — NAND Flash](../core/ch3-nand-flash.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| write amplification (WA) | 寫放大 | — | [Ch 1 — SSD Overview](../core/ch1-overview.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) · [Ch 4 — FTL](../core/ch4-ftl.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| write buffer / buffer | 寫緩存 / 緩沖 | — | [Ch 2 — Controllers & AFA](../core/ch2-controllers-afa.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| write saturation test | 飽和寫測試 | — | [Ch 7 — SSD Testing](../core/ch7-testing.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| WriteBooster | — | UFS pseudo-SLC turbo write buffer (≈ SLC Cache, Ch4) | [Supp B — UFS](../supplements/b-ufs.md#key-vocabulary) |
| XOR | 異或 | — | [Ch 3 — NAND Flash](../core/ch3-nand-flash.md#key-vocabulary-for-decoding-the-original-figures) |
| ZUFS | — | Zoned UFS (≈ ZNS for mobile) | [Supp B — UFS](../supplements/b-ufs.md#key-vocabulary) |
| ZUFS / zoned F2FS | — | F2FS on a zoned device (ZNS/ZUFS) — collapses the double log | [Supp C — Flash File Systems](../supplements/c-flash-file-systems.md#key-vocabulary) |
